steps.summary: Source taxonomy fixed: seven source classes defined, current authority registry mapped, missing audit/DART/client-private/supporting classes identified, and AS2 policy questions prepared.

Authority/citation policy fixed: answer evidence sections, question-type priority order, conflict handling, insufficient-evidence rule, and future schema fields are documented without changing registry schema.

Storage boundary fixed: public metadata-only rule, local-private body/data labels, public report rules, ingestion prerequisites, and special cases for law/DART/client/supporting material are documented.
